executive_summary.title: Growth Engines Reset: New Capital Pools, Credit Breadth and AI Infrastructure Drive the Next Leg

macro_themes.title: New capital pools open
macro_themes.detail: Retirement, insurance and 401(k) channels becoming explicit growth vectors: BlackRock's LifePath with private markets; Brookfield sees more from private wealth, annuities & 401(k); Amundi won Ireland's auto-enrolment pension scheme.

macro_themes.title: Wealth distribution gets productized
macro_themes.detail: Distribution is shifting from simple alternatives access to packaged public-private solutions: Goldman/T. Rowe co-branded model portfolios; KKR+Capital Group building target-date & model-portfolio solutions; Amundi gathered €10B from digital players.
evidence: Goldman + T. Rowe Price co-branded model portfolios
KKR × Capital Group target-date / model portfolios

macro_themes.title: Private Credit broadens out
macro_themes.detail: Private credit is broadening beyond classic direct lending: KKR raised $68B in credit and launched K-ABF; Brookfield scaling real-asset, ABS and insurance-oriented credit; BlackRock working with insurers on private high-grade portfolios.
evidence: KKR: $68B FY credit raised; K-ABF launched

macro_themes.title: AI infra: funded capex, not just narrative
macro_themes.detail: AI infrastructure is now funded capital expenditure, not just narrative: Brookfield launched a $100B AI infrastructure program and a $20B Qatar JV; BlackRock's AI partnership has raised more than $12.5B.
evidence: Brookfield: $100B AI infra program, $20B Qatar JV
Blackstone: 75% of RE equity in data centers/logistics/rental

macro_themes.title: Tokenization + AI productivity ship
macro_themes.detail: Tokenization and AI-led efficiency are moving into execution: State Street launched tokenization of assets, funds and cash and delivered $500M of productivity savings; Goldman's OneGS 3.0 makes AI-led process redesign strategic; Amundi launched its first tokenized MMF share.
evidence: State Street Digital Asset Platform + $500M productivity
